view.title: Validate persona scenario #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The exploratory step validates the scenario of transferring bookings between locations, which is a core requirement of the use case.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The exploratory step validates the scenario of transferring bookings between locations, which is a core requirement of the use case.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #1' directly addresses the requirement of transferring bookings between locations as outlined in the linked use case 'The Multi-Location Chain'. The expected result states that the scenario behavior should be confirmed or produce a clear failure report, which aligns with the functionality described in the use case where appointments are auto-transferred to the nearest location with capacity. This indicates that the step is effectively testing the required behavior.
